title: Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy American dish made with beef and stir-fried vegetables. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Slice the flank steak against the grain into thin strips.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the beef to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned.
4. Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the beef broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional minute.
8. Serve the beef and vegetables over a bed of shredded lettuce.
9. Cook for 15 minutes or until the desired doneness is reached.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
